name: cloud-atlas-am
description: Interoperability between Obsidian and Amazing Marvin

scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:plugin && npm run build:mcp
scripts.dev-build: npm run build:client && tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs dev-build
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:client && tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
